'''鈭歷-h-d''' ('''vahada''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cade|cade]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-h-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cade|cade]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歷-h-d
|-
! Lemma
| vahada
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vahadithi|vahadithi]] || [[word:vahadiji|vahadiji]] || [[word:vahadishi|vahadishi]] || [[word:vahadi|vahadi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vahaduthuth|vahaduthuth]] || [[word:vahadujuj|vahadujuj]] || [[word:vahadushush|vahadushush]] || [[word:vahad|vahad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vahaduthu|vahaduthu]] || [[word:vahaduju|vahaduju]] || [[word:vahadushu|vahadushu]] || [[word:vahadu|vahadu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vahadufuth|vahadufuth]] || [[word:vahadufuj|vahadufuj]] || [[word:vahadufush|vahadufush]] || [[word:vahaduf|vahaduf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vahadethe|vahadethe]] || [[word:vahadeje|vahadeje]] || [[word:vahadeshe|vahadeshe]] || [[word:vahade|vahade]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vahadothoth|vahadothoth]] || [[word:vahadojoj|vahadojoj]] || [[word:vahadoshosh|vahadoshosh]] || [[word:vahad|vahad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vahadotho|vahadotho]] || [[word:vahadojo|vahadojo]] || [[word:vahadosho|vahadosho]] || [[word:vahado|vahado]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vahadofoth|vahadofoth]] || [[word:vahadofoj|vahadofoj]] || [[word:vahadofosh|vahadofosh]] || [[word:vahadof|vahadof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vahad忙th忙|vahad忙th忙]] || [[word:vahad忙j忙|vahad忙j忙]] || [[word:vahad忙sh忙|vahad忙sh忙]] || [[word:vahad忙|vahad忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vahadathath|vahadathath]] || [[word:vahadajaj|vahadajaj]] || [[word:vahadashash|vahadashash]] || [[word:vahad|vahad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vahadatha|vahadatha]] || [[word:vahadaja|vahadaja]] || [[word:vahadasha|vahadasha]] || [[word:vahada|vahada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vahadafath|vahadafath]] || [[word:vahadafaj|vahadafaj]] || [[word:vahadafash|vahadafash]] || [[word:vahadaf|vahadaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:vahadasha|vahadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:govahadasha|govahadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokivahadasha|gokivahadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:vahadn眉sha|vahadn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:govahadnkn眉sha|govahadnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokivahadn眉sha|gokivahadn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vahadsh毛sha|vahadsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govahadnksh毛sha|govahadnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivahadsh毛sha|gokivahadsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vahadrosha|vahadrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:govahadnkrosha|govahadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivahadrosha|gokivahadrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vahadmusha|vahadmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:govahadnkmusha|govahadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivahadmusha|gokivahadmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:vahadsherasha|vahadsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:govahadnksherasha|govahadnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokivahadsherasha|gokivahadsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:vahadngasha|vahadngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:govahadnkngasha|govahadnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokivahadngasha|gokivahadngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vahadyasha|vahadyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:govahadnkyasha|govahadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokivahadyasha|gokivahadyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:vahadyamasha|vahadyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:govahadnkyamasha|govahadnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokivahadyamasha|gokivahadyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:vahadn眉sh毛sha|vahadn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:govahadnkn眉sh毛sha|govahadnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokivahadn眉sh毛sha|gokivahadn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:vahadn眉rosha|vahadn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govahadnkn眉rosha|govahadnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivahadn眉rosha|gokivahadn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vahadn眉musha|vahadn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govahadnkn眉musha|govahadnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivahadn眉musha|gokivahadn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:vahadsh毛n眉sha|vahadsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:govahadnksh毛n眉sha|govahadnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokivahadsh毛n眉sha|gokivahadsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:vahadsh毛rosha|vahadsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govahadnksh毛rosha|govahadnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivahadsh毛rosha|gokivahadsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vahadsh毛musha|vahadsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govahadnksh毛musha|govahadnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivahadsh毛musha|gokivahadsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:vahadron眉sha|vahadron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:govahadnkron眉sha|govahadnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokivahadron眉sha|gokivahadron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:vahadrosh毛sha|vahadrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:govahadnkrosh毛sha|govahadnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokivahadrosh毛sha|gokivahadrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vahadromusha|vahadromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govahadnkromusha|govahadnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivahadromusha|gokivahadromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:vahadmun眉sha|vahadmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:govahadnkmun眉sha|govahadnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokivahadmun眉sha|gokivahadmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:vahadmush毛sha|vahadmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:govahadnkmush毛sha|govahadnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokivahadmush毛sha|gokivahadmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:vahadmurosha|vahadmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govahadnkmurosha|govahadnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivahadmurosha|gokivahadmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:vahad|vahad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:v忙h忙d|v忙h忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hovahad|hovahad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hov忙h忙d|hov忙h忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohovahad|hohovahad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohov忙h忙d|hohov忙h忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉vahad|n眉vahad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉v忙h忙d|n眉v忙h忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉vahad|n眉n眉vahad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉v忙h忙d|n眉n眉v忙h忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂vahad|n茂vahad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂v忙h忙d|n茂v忙h忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂vahad|n茂n茂vahad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂v忙h忙d|n茂n茂v忙h忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luvahad|luvahad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luv忙h忙d|luv忙h忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluvahad|luluvahad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluv忙h忙d|luluv忙h忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:livahad|livahad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liv忙h忙d|liv忙h忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilivahad|lilivahad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliv忙h忙d|liliv忙h忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kovahad|kovahad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kov忙h忙d|kov忙h忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokovahad|kokovahad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokov忙h忙d|kokov忙h忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kevahad|kevahad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kev忙h忙d|kev忙h忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekevahad|kekevahad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekev忙h忙d|kekev忙h忙d]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
